content.en:
"I'm afraid it's going to be difficult to find an opportunity to break through the Blood Transformation Realm in the ruins of the True Dragon Realm!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He was going to leave the True Dragon Realm Ruins for the time being, and the opportunities here were probably of little use to him.

Then, he took the green stone from the ocean in the Ghost Dragon Worm's territory, and then tried to take the green ocean seal away for a long time, and then brought it into the Silent Black Sea.

After all, this green ocean is also an unimaginable treasure land, and if it is successfully removed, it will be enough for humans to give birth to a large number of fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

But he tried many times, first removing a small part of the green ocean, and after bringing it into the outside world, the green energy continued to escape, and the effect would be much reduced.

In the end, the effect of the Green Ocean stabilized at a low level, and it was about possible to slowly cultivate a middle-level immeasurable lifeform into a high-level immeasurable lifeform, but there was no way to cultivate it to the fifth-stage Great Ancestor level.

"The Green Ocean has such an effect, it should be the effect of the origin of the fragment, without the fragment itself, the grade of the Green Ocean will decline, but it will still be of great help to the human race!

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

Silent Black Sea.

Ye Tian moved the green ocean to the territory of the Terran in batches, and then divided the area to guide the green aura into the various areas of the Terran.

The human race that is truly qualified to enter the Green Ocean for cultivation needs at least the strength of a middle-level immeasurable life form, because if it is too weak, it will not be able to withstand the infusion of energy.

Ye Tian could predict that after a long period of time, the number of high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the human race would be many, many.

Sure enough, with this green ocean, the cultivation of the human race was countless times faster, a large number of primary-level immeasurable lifeforms were born, many middle-level immeasurable lifeforms were born, and high-level immeasurable lifeforms were also born every few years.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't pay much attention to it.

At this moment, he was trying to find a way to break through to the Blood Transformation Realm.

However, he went to many places, but he didn't find the opportunity, and he tried countless times, but he didn't succeed in breaking through.

"My flesh and blood body far surpasses other Heavenly Ancestors, it is more difficult for my heart to transform, and if I want to become a blood transformation realm, unless I encounter a great opportunity!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Before there was a good way, he could only slowly use the immeasurable divine power light to integrate into the heart and strengthen the heart little by little, but it didn't have much effect for a long time, and the efficiency was too slow and too slow.

......

Hayabusa Dragon City.

this day.

Seven Heavenly Ancestors gathered here, they were not ordinary Heavenly Ancestors, they were all Heavenly Ancestors of the Blood Transformation Realm.

And there are two from the side of Falcon Dragon City, namely Dongao Heavenly Ancestor and Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor.

The other five Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors were Dongxu Heavenly Ancestor, Sky Devouring Heavenly Ancestor, Blood Cat Heavenly Ancestor, Ten Thousand Bones Heavenly Ancestor, and Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor.

They were all incomparably ancient Heavenly Ancestors, who had become Blood Transformation Realm a long time ago.

Among them, the most powerful is undoubtedly the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, who has already completed the second blood transformation.

"Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor!"

"Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor!"

"Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor!"

The other Heavenly Ancestors were all very respectful.

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor didn't talk nonsense, and said directly: "Everyone, this time I summoned you over, I think you should know what is going on. "

"Are you going to clean up the debris of the Dark Sea?"

Devouring the Sky Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

"Yes!" Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor said solemnly: "Not long ago, I passed through the sixth node of the territorial sea boundary rift and entered the territorial sea boundary rift, the dark sea creatures in the dark sea fragments multiplied too fast, I estimated that in the near future, these dark sea creatures may rush into the territorial waters of Wanlong." Eighteen years ago, the creatures of the Dark Sea caused great damage to our Hundred Thousand Dragons' territorial waters, and this kind of thing can't happen again, so we must clean up those creatures of the Hidden Sea. "

"There are also some chances of the debris of the dark sea, and after it is cleaned up, whoever gets the harvest will belong to whomever it gets. "Ten Thousand Bones Heavenly Ancestor proposed.

"Naturally, it's the same as last time!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor nodded.

Dongao Tianzu said at this time: "Just the seven of us?"

"Well, in case the Blood Transformation Realm True Dragon of the True Dragon Realm Ruins comes out to make trouble, the Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea will at least have the Blood Transformation Realm to stop it, so it's just the seven of us!" Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor said.

"When are you leaving?"

Dongao Tianzu asked.

"Right now!"

Dragon's Tooth said.

Immediately, the seven Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors set off.

This matter was unknown to ordinary Heavenly Ancestors.

Soon, they came to Node 6, through which they could enter the Territorial Sea Rift.

Rumble!!!!

The node was torn apart, creating a pitch-black passage.

The six Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors entered.

Soon, the node was restored.

The years passed, after a period of time had passed.

Click!!

The node was opened, and one after another embarrassed figures rushed out, it was the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, and the body of the Middle East Proud Heavenly Ancestor was only half small, and it was too late to recover.

It was only now that he had time to slowly repair his body.

"Go back first!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

"Hmm!"

The other six Heavenly Ancestors nodded.

Soon, they came to Falcon Dragon City again and started another meeting.

"I miscalculated this time!" the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor said, "I didn't expect that the Dark Sea Fragment would give birth to two Blood Transformation Realm creatures, and the other Blood Transformation Realm creatures would also give birth to six, and more importantly, they would unite to make the threat extremely huge." "

"It should be the poisonous dragon that has changed blood twice, and it has integrated all the creatures of the Dark Sea Fragments. What to do now, the creatures of the Fragments of the Sea are not like the creatures of the True Dragon Fragments. The True Dragon Fragment is a bit special, and the creatures there can't come out at all if they don't reach two blood transformations. But the creatures of the fragments of the dark sea can come out at will, and they also invaded the territorial waters of the ten thousand dragons before the 180,000 dragon era, and this time they will definitely invade again. It's a pity that we can't destroy the node, if we can, those sea creatures won't be able to enter!"

"Destroy the node, we won't be able to leave Wanlong's territorial waters in the future, this is not a good idea. "Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

"It's a good thing that I can't leave, I don't really want to leave anyway, so that's fine. "

Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

Dongao Heavenly Ancestor said at this time: "Let's find a way to deal with that poisonous dragon and the Hidden Sea Creature, we must let other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors also join, we must kill the other party, otherwise it will be trouble!"

"Well, then inform them!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor agreed.

Afterwards, they informed the other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and one by one the incomparably ancient Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors had awakened from their long years of retreat.

And Ye Tian also received a summons from Dongao Tianzu.
